label: Interactive Robotic Figure in C/C++
title: Interactive Robotic Figure in C/C++
description: Achieved real-time audio-to-motion translation for an interactive robotic figure, demonstrated through 100+ live conversation demos and 16K+ social media views, by developing an embedded C++ audio processing pipeline that synchronizes voice actor speech with robotic mouth movement via I2C communication. Improved embedded system performance by designing a multithreaded architecture for concurrent audio processing and motor control, optimizing CPU usage and ensuring responsive, lifelike motion.
technologies: C, C++, Raspberry Pi, Arduino, Servo Motors

label: Computer Vision Spell Casting
title: Computer Vision based spell detection
description: Built a distributed edge-AI interactive system for the Qualcomm Multiverse Hackathon using a custom Andriod app and Arduino UNO Q, combining on-device computer vision and speech recognition to detect “wand spells” that trigger real-time hardware actuation (motors, LED matrix). Designed a multi-device architecture using MQTT where mobile AI inference publishes events to an embedded broker controlling physical hardware, with a Python/Flask dashboard streaming live spell events across the network.
technologies: Python, AI/ML, Computer Vision, Aurdino UNO Q [Linux machine + Microcontroller]

label: ML Modeling Theme Park Wait Times
title: Predictive Modeling of Theme Park Wait Times
description: Built and evaluated linear regression and machine learning models to investigate the correlation between physical ride characteristics and guest demand (proxied by wait times).

label: Campus Events Planner Application
title: Campus Events Planner Web Application in JavaScript
description: Developed a functional web application for discovering and organizing campus events with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and integrating a storage system for event tracking, as measured by consistent user engagement and successful event sign-ups during user testing.

label: TEA @ UCSD Site
title: Themed Entertainment Association at UCSD Website
description: Developed and maintained the Themed Entertainment Association at UCSD's website using Tailwind CSS, significantly boosting the club's digital presence and increasing online engagement and visibility.
technologies: Tailwind CSS, HTML, JavaScript, Github Actions

label: Multithreaded File Compressor in C++
title: Multithreaded File Compressor in C++
description: Multithreaded application for high speed file compression
